User.title: User
User.description: A user of the FlowPay application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

onboardingStatus.description: The current status of the user's onboarding.

onboardingData.description: The data collected during the onboarding process.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user was last updated.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.
